title: Doggy Tricks

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
a single or multi-message switch
record:
the dog's name and a command e.g. "Ozzy, sit!"

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1.  Record fun commands for the switch user to "tell" the dog.
2.  Reward the dog with treats to keep them motivated and engaged.

tooltipText: Activate the switch to call your dog over or command them to do a trick (make sure they get a treat!)
